description: A rig manager must ensure that all critical lifting and pressure control equipment has valid, up-to-date third-party certifications.

nodes.task_description: Run a report from the certification management system to identify any equipment with certifications expiring in the next 90 days.

expected_outcome.value: A report is generated listing several pieces of equipment, including the BOP, with upcoming expiration dates.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a third-party inspector to come to the rig to perform the required inspections and recertify the equipment.

expected_outcome.value: An inspector is booked for a specific date.

nodes.task_description: Once the inspection is complete, upload the new certificates into the system and update the expiration dates.

expected_outcome.value: The system is updated with the new certification documents, ensuring the rig remains compliant.
